summary: Full backend + frontend testing completed for WedWish. 17/17 backend pytest tests PASSED covering admin auth, public endpoints, guest identify, RSVP CRUD, gift reserve/unreserve/purchased + max-reservations + non-owner 403, no-leak of reserver identity, contributions, guestbook, admin stats, product import, admin event CRUD. Frontend end-to-end flows all PASSED: home (logo, hero RSVP/Registry, countdown, nav, couple names), events RSVP via guest-identify modal, registry reserve -> unreserve/purchased buttons, cash gifts UPI display + QR + 3 fund cards + contribute modal, guestbook post, admin login -> dashboard with all 6 stat widgets and all 7 tabs (settings/events/gifts/funds/guests/rsvps/contribs).

issues: data-testid mismatch with review request spec: actual ids are 'guest-name-input' and 'guest-email-input' but review request references 'guest-identify-name' and 'guest-identify-email'. App works; only a naming spec discrepancy. Recommend renaming for consistency.

action_items: (Optional) Rename guest identify modal input data-testids from guest-name-input/guest-email-input to guest-identify-name/guest-identify-email to match the review request naming.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py mixes seed/auth/CRUD/upload in a single ~710 line file. Consider splitting into routers (admin, gifts, guests, funds, contributions, settings, uploads) for maintainability.
/api/admin/funds/{fid} PUT does not 404 on missing fund (no matched_count check). Other PUT endpoints do (events, gifts).
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in modern FastAPI; switch to lifespan context manager.
Hero/event seed images are external Unsplash/Pexels URLs — fine for demo but flag for production caching/legal review.
seed_data_creation: Test-only data created: a handful of TEST_ guests/RSVPs/reservations/contributions/guestbook posts during runs. Reservations get released so available gifts remain >=2 across runs (test relies on this).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - 17 tests, all passing. Use BASE = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Note GuestIdentify modal real testids are guest-name-input / guest-email-input (NOT guest-identify-name as docs say). Reserve flow caps at MAX_RESERVATIONS=2 per guest (active+non-purchased). Gifts seeded: 6; Events: 4; Funds: 3.
